name_en: Small Size "Export Product" 🚩🚩🚩 Top quality, price is a bit high 😯 OHANEL 🔮🔮🔮 25A Grained Handle Mailer Bag. A versatile style that is both sweet and salty, combining looks and practicality, mastering that relaxed and expensive look 🤏🏻. Grained calfskin 🐂 very durable, retro matte gold hardware. Capacity fits daily items 👍🏻. Larger than previous flap bags 😌. Has a handle for hand carrying, and a short leather chain strap, which can be worn as an accessory or on the shoulder. Size: 15.5*22*6cm/5147001180
